content:
# Sessile Drop

**Summary**: A method used to measure the contact angle of a liquid on a solid surface by observing a droplet.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-muhammed|Muhammed, 2024]] used sessile drop to determine contact angles for various H2 and cushion gas mixtures.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The study confirmed that rock wettability remained strongly water-wet (20° to 41°) across all tested conditions using the sessile drop method. ([[2024-muhammed|Muhammed, 2024, p. 125]])
